scripts.dev:frontend: sh -c 'npm run css:watch & css_pid=$!; trap "kill $css_pid 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; npm run shadow:watch'
scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run api & api_pid=$!; npm run dev:frontend & frontend_pid=$!; trap "kill $api_pid $frontend_pid 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; wait $frontend_pid'
scripts.compile: npm run css:build && clojure -M:shadow compile dev
scripts.release: npm run css:release && cp public/favicon.svg target/release/public/favicon.svg && node scripts/write-config.mjs target/release/public && clojure -M:shadow release release && cp public/*.md target/release/public/
scripts.lint:clj: clj-kondo --lint src test resources deps.edn shadow-cljs.edn
scripts.test:e2e:release: VOCAB_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080 npm run release && mkdir -p target/release/public && cp public/*.html public/favicon.svg target/release/public/ && playwright test -c playwright.release.config.ts
scripts.verify: npm run lint:clj && npm run test:clj && npm run compile && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:release
